h1.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically top-level section titles in similar reports are bold, larger font, and centered or left-aligned.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically sub-section titles are bold and left-aligned.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption identifier, bolded text at the start of a caption block.
Scientific species names, rendered in italics (e.g., Mytilopsis sallei, M. adamsi).
Source citation for figures, typically at the end of the caption in parentheses.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: none observed; standard LaTeX $...$ recommended for inline variables if present.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Year style in parentheses, e.g., (Trinidad et al 2019).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Isolated Arabic numeral at the bottom right corner representing the page number.
